source: Ghidra decompilation of amd_fidelityfx_upscaler_dx12.dll (FSR 4.1.0, build abd3160, Mar 20 2026)
summary: The host DLL writes constant-buffer VALUES in exactly one place: FUN_18000d5b0 (ffxProvider_FSR4::Dispatch). It fills 4 separate cbuffers per frame, uploads each via the backend Upload fn (ctx+0x78), then iterates the 27 model passes (ctx+0x238 + passIdx*0x8e68), packing SRV/UAV/CBV handles per pass via FUN_18000d380 and recording barriers+Dispatch via FUN_180004eb0. Per-pass WEIGHT OFFSETS are NOT written as discrete host constants; the host binds the 131072-byte InitializerBuffer (weight blob) as a raw SRV and the shader derives tensor offsets from the shared FSR4Constants + baked-in shader constants. The host's weight contribution is purely the blob upload at CreateContext (0x20000 bytes).

function_map.ffxDispatch: text_ffxDispatch.c @ 0x37ee0 — thin export; vtable[7] (offset 0x38) indirect call into provider
function_map.FUN_18000d5b0: text_00d5b0.c @ 0xd5b0 — PROVIDER DISPATCH (ffxProvider_FSR4::Dispatch). Validates params, selects quality preset, writes all 4 cbuffers, dispatches SPD/AutoExposure before the 27-model-pass loop, then optional RCAS/debug after the loop. THIS is where cbuffer values come from.
function_map.FUN_1800083c0: text_0083c0.c @ 0x83c0 — dispatch-dimension calculator. Fills per-tier render dims + per-pass thread-group grid (X,Y,Z) for 14 grid slots from preset tile tables. Output is a 0x110-byte cbuffer.
function_map.FUN_18000d380: text_00d380.c @ 0xd380 — per-pass render-job packer. Copies SRV/UAV/CBV descriptor handles from context tables into a per-pass job using the pass's binding-index arrays; submits via ctx+0x90.
function_map.FUN_180004eb0: text_004eb0.c @ 0x4eb0 — command-list render recorder. Resource barriers (incl. UAV-counter/AtomicCompareExchange scratch barriers via FUN_180001710), SetComputeRootCBV (plVar4+0xc0), SetRootDescriptorTable (plVar4+0x90/0x98), Dispatch (param_3+0x70). Operates on a per-frame cbuffer ring (frameIdx*0x19000).
function_map.FUN_18000b3c0: text_00b3c0.c @ 0xb3c0 — CreateContext PSO builder. switch(preset 0..5), iterates 27 FFX_FSR4 passes (0x1b) + SPD_AUTOEXPOSURE(0x1b) + RCAS(0x1d) + extra(0x1c). Uploads 0x20000 (131072) byte InitializerBuffer per preset. Per-pass PSO struct stride = 0x8e68.
function_map.FUN_1800041f0: text_0041f0.c @ 0x41f0 — root-signature + binding-table builder (D3D12SerializeRootSignature). Builds per-resource-category binding arrays at ctx offsets 0x44(CBV)/0x2344(SRV)/0x4644(UAV)/0x6944(sampler)/0x8c44(CSO), entry stride 0x8c.
function_map.FUN_180033180: text_033180.c @ 0x33180 — per-pass resource-binding SCHEMA lookup. switch(passIndex 0..7+) returns static descriptor tables (33 qwords) copied to caller. Defines which SRV/UAV/CBV slots each pass consumes.
function_map.FUN_180001df0: text_001df0.c @ 0x1df0 — DX12 backend allocator. Allocates scratch/upload rings sized by frameCount: cbuffer ring = frameCount*0x19000, scratch0 = frameCount*0xbe000, scratch1 = frameCount*0x8000, scratch2 = frameCount*0xc8000.
function_map.FUN_180001710: (called from 004eb0) — resource barrier builder for UAV-counter resources that back the AtomicCompareExchange scratch allocation.

loop_structure: Per-frame in FUN_18000d5b0: (1) compute outputSize, renderSize, scale ratio -> select preset uVar19 in {0..5} (DRS=4 when ctx flag set, else by ratio thresholds DAT_180ec57c8/57d0/57e0/57e8). (2) if preset changed, call FUN_18000b3c0 to (re)build PSOs. (3) fill FSR4Constants cbuffer (ctx+0x10c600, 0x100B) and upload to CBV slot ctx+0xf8. (4) if AutoExposure: fill SPD cbuffer (ctx+0x10c700, 0x100B)->slot ctx+0x118, dispatch SPD before the 27-model-pass loop. (5) FUN_1800083c0(outW,outH,dimsBuf,preset) -> upload 0x110B dispatch-dims cbuffer to slot ctx+0x138. (6) for passIdx in 0..0x1a (27): FUN_18000d380(ctx, ctx+0x238+passIdx*0x8e68, gridX, gridY). (7) optional RCAS dispatch on ctx+0xf0730 (grid=ceil(outW/16),ceil(outH/16)) after the loop and optional debug-view dispatch on ctx+0x102400 after the loop. (8) frame counter ctx+0x10c900++.

preset_tile_tables.note: preset 3+ falls back to stride {w:0x8, h:0xc} (i.e. 8x12) — DRS/native path

dispatch_grid_calculator.tier_loop: steps puVar8 by 0x3c while < 0x3fc (17 tiers); per tier writes [roundUp(renderW,tileW)*scaleX, roundUp(renderH,tileH)*scaleY, 0, 0] (4 ints) into outBuf starting at index 2
dispatch_grid_calculator.grid_passes: After the tier loop, computes thread-group grid (X,Y,Z,1) for 14 dispatch slots, each stored at outBuf[0x44 + pass*4]. Grid formulas per slot use round-up divisors: 0x20(>>5)=32, 0x10(>>4)=16, 4(>>2)=4, 0x40(>>6)=64, plus /2 for a couple of slots. Helper FUN_180008250(g1,g2,g3,buf,preset) records each. Output cbuffer = 0x110 (272) bytes -> CBV slot ctx+0x138.

FSR4Constants.note: Structurally identical to FSR 4.0.2 FSR4Constants (report 00-final-re-report.md sec 3.3). Fields 0x38/0x3c (deltaJitter) gated by reactive-mask context bool ctx+0x225.

DispatchDimensions.contents: header[0..0x43] = per-tier aligned render dimensions (W,H,0,0 per tier, 17 tiers); body[0x44..] = 14 (gridX,gridY,gridZ,pad) quads, one per dispatch slot. The pass-iteration grid for the 27 model passes themselves is NOT in here — those grids are read from the per-pass PSO struct and passed as args to FUN_18000d380.

ExposureResource.contents: [0]=computedExposureScale (exp2 of sharpness-driven exponent when non-autoexposure; see bitfield/log2 path at lines 447-455), [8]=0. Built from dispatchDesc.preExposure/sharpness. Also receives the resource descriptor pointers (color/depth/motion/exposure/output) copied at lines 337-367 but those are uploaded to descriptor-heap slots (ctx+0x14c/0x150/0x154/0x158/0x1dc), not into this cbuffer.

per_pass_cbuffer._comment: There is NO per-pass distinct cbuffer. ALL 27 model passes bind the SAME shared FSR4Constants (ctx+0xf8) and DispatchDimensions (ctx+0x138) cbuffers. What varies per pass is: (a) the SRV/UAV/CBV descriptor-handle selection (done in FUN_18000d380 by indexing the per-pass binding tables), and (b) the dispatch grid (X,Y) passed as args. The pass index (0..26) selects a per-pass PSO struct at ctx+0x238+passIdx*0x8e68 holding the binding-index arrays + shader bytecode handle. Sample grids from FUN_18000d5b0:

weight_offset_source.answer: NOT a host cbuffer. Weight/tensor offsets are computed ON THE GPU inside each shader blob.
host_contribution: Binds the 131072-byte InitializerBuffer (weight blob) as a raw/structured SRV (resource id 17/18 per architecture-map). Uploaded once at CreateContext: 0x20000 bytes per preset (text_00b3c0).

Provides FSR4Constants (dimensions, scale, jitter) via cbuffer; shaders combine these with per-pass constants baked into shader bytecode (pass index, layer channel counts, HWNC strides) to derive each tensor's base offset into the weight blob + the scratch buffer.
The host NEVER writes a per-pass 'weight base offset' i32/float into any cbuffer.

zones.name: extra_fp32_output_params
zones.note: 4.1.0 ONLY — FP32 output composition / scale parameters consumed by postpass; absent in 4.0.2

scratch_buffer_allocation.per_frame_wraparound: FUN_180004eb0 resets the per-frame cbuffer cursor (param_1+0x44) to 0 when (frameCount*0x19000) < cursor+1+dispatchesThisFrame (lines 99 & 303). This is the ring-buffer wrap for the GPU cbuffer VAs computed as base + cursor*elementSize.

gpu_atomic_scratch.mechanism: AtomicCompareExchange inside Group-A 'data orchestration' shaders (782-9088 ACE ops/blob per architecture-map).
gpu_atomic_scratch.host_setup: FUN_180004eb0 emits UAV-counter resource barriers (FUN_180001710) that transition the counter buffer backing the atomic allocator. The barrier descriptor is written at ctx+0x68..0x84 per allocation slot: fields = {state=0, pad, uavGPUHandle.lo, uavGPUHandle.hi, 0xFFFFFFFF, counterLo, counterHi, pad2}. Counter resources flagged with bits 2/4/0x40 per category. Counter array grows at ctx+0x1068.

0x20000.meaning: InitializerBuffer (weight blob) total size; uploaded per preset at CreateContext

0x1688.meaning: fixed constant seen in dispatch/barrier setup (text_004eb0:422, text_0025d0:351, text_0031b0:102, text_003940:55/108) — used as a dispatch element/tile count in the structured-resource UAV path; candidate for a fixed tensor-tile element count

0x1b.meaning: number of FFX_FSR4 model passes dispatched per frame (also 0x1c=28 incl. extra, 0x1d=29 RCAS, pass-name indices)

7208.meaning: weight blob zone: fp16 params size (offset 0)

122880.meaning: weight blob zone: fp8/uint8 weights size (offset 7208)

130088.meaning: weight blob zone: extra FP32 output-parameter region start (= 7208+122880); also v4.0.2 total blob size

222.meaning: count of extra FP32 output parameters (4.1.0 only)

byte_offset_hex_search.note: The specific hex offsets 0x1C28 / 0x1FC28 etc. do NOT appear as immediates in the decompiled C. Those are GPU-side offsets into the weight blob/scratch computed by shader arithmetic from cbuffer values — confirming the architecture-map conclusion that 4.1.0 tensor offsets are runtime-derived, not host-baked. The only weight-region offsets present in host code are the blob-zone boundaries 7208/122880/130088/131072 (and they appear in spec/blob-format.json, derived from binary analysis, not as function immediates).

confidence.FSR4Constants_layout: High — directly decoded from text_00d5b0.c lines 291-336; matches 4.0.2 schema per repo reports.
confidence.no_per_pass_weight_offset_cbuffer: High — no host function writes a pass-indexed weight base offset; architecture-map + tensor-verification-report both flag 4.1.0 offsets as GPU-derived (Unresolved at runtime).
confidence.exact_runtime_tensor_offsets: Unresolved — requires runtime cbuffer+rawBufferLoad capture (see reports/00-final-re-report.md §5).
